name: Easy Peanut Butter Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, heavy cream, and corn syrup in a saucepan over medium heat.
2. Cook until the mixture reaches a soft ball stage (235°F).
3. Remove from heat and add peanut butter.
4. Beat until the mixture is firm.
5. Pour into a buttered 8-inch square pan.
6. Makes 36 servings.
